name: upload_component
description: Upload standalone multi-file component bundle and receive review artifact specification

component_intent.description: Short natural-language summary of the component goal and expected behavior.

target_framework.description: Target UI framework/runtime, for example react, nextjs, vue, or svelte.

constraints.description: Optional hard requirements such as accessibility, layout limits, browser support, or banned libraries.

style_system.description: Optional styling approach, for example tailwind, css-modules, vanilla-css, styled-components.

source.description: Source bundle payload containing the entrypoint and all source files.

type.description: Source transport type. Must be exactly 'bundle'.

entrypoint.description: Relative path of the main file inside source.files, for example src/index.tsx.

files.description: List of source files included in this component bundle.

path.description: Relative file path within the bundle.

dependencies.description: Runtime dependency map of package name to version range.

peer_dependencies.description: Peer dependency map of package name to version range.

dev_dependencies.description: Development dependency map of package name to version range.

metadata.description: Optional caller-defined metadata for traceability and routing.
